title: samach #8055
definition:
1) to rejoice, be glad
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to rejoice
        1a2) to rejoice (arrogantly), exult (at)
        1a3) to rejoice (religiously)
    1b) (Piel) to cause to rejoice, gladden, make glad
    1c) (Hiphil) to cause to rejoice, gladden, make glad
